subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The All-Loving maketh mention of thee from this praiseworthy station, and summoneth thee unto God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یذکرک الودود من هذا المقام المحمود و یدعوک الی الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @prayer for forgiveness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
